chapter_title.en: Chapter on Making up Fasts of the Month of Ramadan

text: 2001 - وَ رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ تَقْضِي شَهْرَ رَمَضَانَ فَيُكْرِهُهَا زَوْجُهَا عَلَى اَلْإِفْطَارِ فَقَالَ «لاَ يَنْبَغِي أَنْ يُكْرِهَهَا بَعْدَ زَوَالِ اَلشَّمْسِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2001 - Sama‘ah narrated from Abu Basir, who said: I asked Abu ‘Abd Allah (as) about a woman making up missed fasts from Month of Ramadan, and her husband compels her to break her fast.
Imam (as) said: "It is not appropriate for him to compel her to break her fast after the sun has passed its zenith."
